current.en: John's Norway, powered by a Haaland brace, send Joe's Brazil packing — sorry Joe, the Vikings have spoken! 🪓⚽

history.en: Kate's Atlas Lions roar past Alex's co-hosts 3-0 — sorry, Alex, Morocco didn't get the maple syrup memo! 🦁🍁
Sorry, Martin — Tarang's France needed just one Mbappé penalty to send Paraguay packing and march into the quarterfinals! 🇫🇷⚽
Jen's Los Cafeteros serve James a piping-hot café solo — Colombia's Arias taps in the only goal to send Ghana's Black Stars home! ☕🇨🇴
Beccy's Boys survive the scare of the tournament — Messi & co. edge out Laura's Blue Sharks 3-2 in extra time, but don't let Beccy forget how close it got! 🦈🇦🇷
Joe's Pharaohs shatter Ben's Socceroo dreams from the spot — Salah and co march into the last 16 while Ben is left contemplating what might have been! 🇪🇬🔥
Andy's Swiss army marches on as Baz's Fennecs are sent packing — a clean 2-0 and not even a penalty drama to soften the blow! 🇨🇭🔥
Sorry Anthony, but Martin's Portugal shrugged off Modric, Perisic, and three disallowed goals to send Croatia packing with a stoppage-time Ramos header — your checkerboard dreams are toast! 🐓
Jordan's Spain put on a masterclass, sending Eleanor's Austria packing with a ruthless 3-0 hammering — no drama, no extra time, just pure Jordan dominance! 🇪🇸💥
Michael's USA march on as the Stars and Stripes send Michael's Bosnia packing 2-0 — even with 10 men, no mercy!
Ben B's Belgium break Megan's hearts — the Red Devils trailed 0-2 before Lukaku and Tielemans (twice!) staged an all-time comeback to send Senegal packing in extra time! 🔴😈
Baz's brave Three Lions survived an almighty scare before Kane's late double broke Emmy's Congolese hearts — Baz goes through, Emmy goes home!
Ben WL's Mexico light up the Azteca — a clinical 2-0 dumps Chris's Ecuador out and books El Tri a place in the last 16.
Tarang's France steamrolled James's Sweden 3-0 — no drama, no way back for the Swedes.
John's Norway snatch it late — a stoppage-time winner breaks Alex's Ivory Coast and roars into the last 16.

Penalty heartbreak all round: Martin's Paraguay buried Evie's Germany and Kate's Morocco dumped out Laura's Netherlands, both from the spot. Earlier, Joe's Brazil edged Emmy's Japan and Alex's Canada saw off Isaac's South Africa.
